title: Opendoor Technologies Investor Relations and Earnings Summary
text: Opendoor Technologies (OPEN) Investor Relations, Earnings Summary and Outlook. The company is driving to Adjusted Net Income breakeven by the end of 2026, measured on a twelve-month go-forward basis. More recently, as of April 1st, Opendoor is adjusted EBITDA profitable on a 12-month go-forward basis. For Q2 2026, management provided specific guidance: Revenue growth of approximately 25% quarter-over-quarter, Contribution Margin for Q2 2026 to fall in the middle of the 5-7% targeted range. Expected to be Adjusted EBITDA breakeven for Q2 2026, plus or minus a few million. Recent market conditions have been challenging due to elevated mortgage rates and affordability constraints, yet Opendoor views these conditions positively for its velocity-focused strategy.
